label: Unit costs for outcome monetisation in programme evaluation and CBA
note: Values compiled from GMCA Unit Cost Database (Greater Manchester Combined Authority), PSSRU Unit Costs of Health and Social Care (University of Kent), Home Office Crime Cost estimates, DfE/IFS education returns, and DLUHC/MHCLG housing cost data. All values are indicative national averages. Regional and individual variation is significant. Always cite the source when using these values in reports.

fiscal_cost_of_unemployment_uc.description: Average Universal Credit standard allowance plus typical housing element for a single jobseeker. Does not include council tax support or other passported benefits.

fiscal_cost_of_unemployment_total.description: Total fiscal cost including benefits, lost tax/NIC revenue, and additional public service use (health, housing). GMCA/New Economy estimate.

value_of_sustained_employment.description: Fiscal and economic value of moving one person from unemployment to sustained employment (6+ months). Includes benefit savings, tax revenue, and reduced public service use.

neet_fiscal_cost_16_18.description: Annual fiscal cost of a 16-18 year old not in education, employment, or training.

neet_lifetime_cost.description: Estimated lifetime public finance cost of being NEET at age 16-18 (discounted).

gp_consultation.description: Average cost of a GP surgery consultation (including direct care staff costs and overheads). Duration ~9.2 minutes.
gp_consultation.source: PSSRU Unit Costs of Health and Social Care 2024

ae_attendance.description: Average cost of an A&E attendance (all types). Type 1 major A&E higher (~GBP 210).

hospital_inpatient_day.description: Average cost per inpatient bed-day (non-elective). Elective admissions lower (~GBP 430).

hospital_admission_non_elective.description: Average cost of a non-elective hospital admission (all specialties). Average length of stay ~4 days.

mental_health_episode.description: Average cost of a community mental health episode (assessment, treatment, follow-up). Inpatient mental health significantly higher (~GBP 10k+).

substance_misuse_treatment.description: Average cost of structured substance misuse treatment per year.

qaly.description: Value of a Quality Adjusted Life Year. Green Book supplementary guidance on health. Note: discount health/QALY benefits at 1.5% (not the standard 3.5%).
qaly.source: Green Book Supplementary Guidance: Valuing Health (DHSC)

statistical_life.description: Value of a Statistical Life (VSL) for use in CBA. Based on willingness-to-pay studies.
statistical_life.source: DfT TAG, Green Book supplementary guidance

homicide.description: Total economic and social cost of a homicide. Includes: physical/emotional harm to victim, criminal justice costs, lost economic output.
homicide.source: Home Office Research Report 99 (2018 update, inflated to 2024-25 prices)

domestic_abuse.description: Includes physical/emotional harm, lost economic output, health service use, criminal justice, social services, housing. Estimated from Oliver et al. (2019).

fraud.description: Average cost per fraud offence. Highly variable (from GBP 50 to millions).

gcse_5_a_to_c_equiv.description: Estimated lifetime earnings uplift from achieving 5+ GCSEs at grades 9-4 (A*-C equivalent), compared to not achieving this threshold. Discounted present value.
gcse_5_a_to_c_equiv.source: DfE Measuring the Net Present Value of Further Education in England (updated), IFS Returns to Education

level_2_qualification.description: Lifetime earnings uplift from achieving a Level 2 qualification (equivalent to 5 GCSEs or Level 2 NVQ).

level_3_qualification.description: Lifetime earnings uplift from achieving a Level 3 qualification (A-levels or equivalent).

degree_level_4_plus.description: Lifetime earnings premium from a university degree compared to Level 3 only. Varies significantly by subject and institution.

apprenticeship_completion.description: Estimated lifetime earnings uplift from completing an apprenticeship (Level 3). Combined fiscal and individual benefit.

persistent_absence_cost.description: Estimated fiscal cost per year of a pupil being persistently absent (missing 10%+ of sessions). Includes reduced attainment, increased social services contact.

temporary_accommodation.description: Average cost of providing temporary accommodation to a homeless household. Varies enormously by region (London: ~GBP 40k+, outside London: ~GBP 15k).
temporary_accommodation.source: DLUHC Homelessness Statistics, NAO Homelessness Report (2017, updated)

rough_sleeping.description: Estimated public service cost of a rough sleeper. Includes: emergency health services, mental health, substance misuse, police, outreach, temporary shelter.

housing_support_service.description: Cost of supported housing or floating support service per person.

category_1_hazard_remediation_health_sav.description: Average annual NHS cost saving from remediating a Category 1 housing hazard (e.g., excess cold, falls, damp). BRE Housing Health Cost Calculator.
category_1_hazard_remediation_health_sav.source: BRE (2019). The Full Cost of Poor Housing. Updated by BRE HHCC.

transport.note: For detailed transport values, use the DfT TAG Databook directly. These are headline values only.

primary_databases: GMCA Unit Cost Database (Greater Manchester Combined Authority, 2023 update)
PSSRU Unit Costs of Health and Social Care (University of Kent, 2024)
Home Office Research Report 99: The Economic and Social Costs of Crime (2018 update)
DLUHC Homelessness Statistics and Appraisal Guide
source.inflation_method: Values from older publications updated to 2024-25 prices using GDP deflator (OBR forecast series).
source.update_frequency: PSSRU: annual. TAG: annual. Home Office: periodic (last major update 2018). GMCA: periodic. DfE: periodic.
